overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077 through a rainy Night City. The player navigates elevated highways and commercial streets with neon signage, eventually stopping at a traffic intersection behind a red sports car.

events.description: turns right at intersection onto elevated highway ramp
enters covered area beneath large concrete overpass

agents.ego_description: driving on wet elevated highway following a yellow sedan through covered sections

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan driving ahead in the same lane maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: orange-yellow metal railings lining the edge of the elevated highway
massive concrete highway overpass structure creating partial cover overhead
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade

segments.scene_description: Driving on an elevated highway during heavy rain, partially sheltered by massive concrete overpasses. The vehicle follows a yellow sedan along the wet asphalt, with yellow safety barriers lining the right side and digital billboards visible on surrounding buildings.

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open rain with increased visibility
passes through intersection with yellow crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: navigating through industrial area with construction barriers on the right side

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving in adjacent lane parallel to ego vehicle

entered.detail: blue construction fencing and concrete barriers lining the sidewalk
metal security fencing behind the construction barriers

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the covered highway section into open rain, entering an industrial zone with construction barriers and chain-link fencing on the right. The road features intersection crosswalks and the digital billboard recedes into the distance as the vehicle continues forward.

events.description: enters commercial district with visible storefronts and neon signage
turns right at intersection following the yellow car

agents.ego_description: driving through commercial area with neon signage, passing pedestrians on covered sidewalks

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with purple umbrella walking along the covered sidewalk

entered.detail: ground level shops with awnings and neon signage including a pizza restaurant
covered walkway with blue support columns protecting pedestrians from rain
floating holographic display projecting above the street level

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a vibrant commercial district with neon-lit storefronts and covered sidewalks. The vehicle turns at an intersection while passing pedestrians under blue-columned canopies, with holographic advertisements floating above the wet streets.

events.description: approaches red traffic light and stops behind red sports car
comes to complete stop at intersection waiting for light change

agents.ego_description: stopping at red traffic light behind a red sports car with police cruiser visible on left

notable_agents.action: red sports car stopped at traffic light directly ahead
police cruiser stopped at intersection in left lane

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal structure displaying red light
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection, the vehicle slows and stops behind a red sports car at a red traffic light. A police cruiser waits in the left lane while pedestrians cross at the marked crosswalk, and the commercial storefronts recede into the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy urban landscape that transitions from a sheltered highway into an open industrial zone. It begins beneath massive concrete overpasses in heavy rain, following a yellow sedan along wet asphalt lined with yellow safety barriers and digital billboards. As the vehicle moves forward, the camera exits the covered section and emerges into the open downpour, leaving the shelter of the overpasses behind. The scene then shifts toward an industrial area characterized by chain-link fencing and construction barriers on the right, passing over intersection crosswalks. Finally, the road opens up as the digital billboards recede into the distance while the vehicle continues its steady progression.

The shot follows a continuous drive through a vibrant commercial district that culminates in a sudden halt at a busy city intersection. It begins by weaving through neon-lit storefronts and covered sidewalks, passing pedestrians beneath blue-columned canopies as holographic advertisements float over the wet pavement. As the vehicle approaches a major junction, the momentum slows and the surrounding commercial facades begin to recede into the background. The scene then shifts to a standstill behind a sleek red sports car at a red traffic light, with a police cruiser idling in the left lane while pedestrians cross the marked street.
